title: begonia calliantha
intro: Begonia calliantha, a species of flowering plant in the Begonia genus, is also known as the 'Begonia Calliantha' or 'Dragon Wing Begonia'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Begonia calliantha include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
